4-1BB_Base.description: 2nd Gen CAR-T with 4-1BB. Used in Kymriah, Abecma, Carvykti, Breyanzi.

usage_context.role: Full scaffold template

CD28_Base.description: 2nd Gen CAR-T with CD28. Used in Yescarta, Tecartus.

usage_context.role: Full scaffold template

OX40_ICOS_3rdGen.description: 3rd Gen CAR-T with dual OX40+ICOS costimulation.

usage_context.role: Full scaffold template

4-1BB_IL2Rb_5thGen.description: 5th Gen CAR-T with 4-1BB + truncated IL-2Rβ for JAK/STAT autonomous signaling.

usage_context.role: Full scaffold template
Full scaffold template

CAR-NK_NKG2D.description: CAR-NK using NKG2D natural killer receptor for stress-ligand recognition.

usage_context.role: Full scaffold template
Full scaffold template

CAR-M_Megf10.description: CAR-Macrophage with MEGF10 phagocytic receptor signaling.

usage_context.role: Full scaffold template

CD8a_Short.description: CD8α short hinge 45aa. Membrane-proximal targets (MSLN, GD2).
CD8a_Short.tier_justification: Used in Kymriah, Abecma, Carvykti, Breyanzi (4-1BB-based products)

usage_context.role: Membrane-proximal epitope targeting (e.g., GD2, CD19, BCMA, GPC3)

CD8a_Short.design_notes: Rule: epitope-membrane distance <5nm → CD8α Short. Avoids steric clash. Key for solid tumor antigens with membrane-proximal epitopes.

CD8a_Long.tier_justification: Published in multiple CAR-T papers for membrane-distal epitopes

usage_context.role: Membrane-distal or glycocalyx-shielded epitopes

CD8a_Long.design_notes: Use when epitope is buried under glycocalyx or membrane-distal (>10nm). Risk: excess flexibility may reduce synapse quality.

CD28_Medium.description: CD28 medium hinge 39aa. Lipid raft localization.
CD28_Medium.tier_justification: Used in Yescarta and Tecartus (CD28-based products)

usage_context.role: Standard lipid-raft-targeting hinge for CD28 scaffolds

CD28_Medium.design_notes: Use with CD28 TM domain for synergistic lipid raft localization. Consistent 39aa length across all CD28-based approved products.

IgG4_SPLE_Long.description: IgG4 hinge+CH2+CH3 229aa. S228P (anti-half-antibody) + LALA Fc-null. Long reach for membrane-distal or glycocalyx-shielded targets.
IgG4_SPLE_Long.tier_justification: Multiple published CAR-T papers; S228P prevents half-antibody formation

usage_context.role: Long-reach hinge for membrane-distal antigens with stability improvement

IgG4_SPLE_Long.design_notes: S228P (Labrijn et al. Nat Biotechnol 2009) prevents disulfide shuffling. Add LALA (L234A/L235A) to eliminate residual Fc binding. Use for HER2, EGFR, and other membrane-distal solid tumor targets.

CD8a.description: CD8α signal peptide 21aa. Most widely used in CAR-T vectors.
CD8a.tier_justification: Used in Kymriah, Yescarta, Abecma, Carvykti, Breyanzi, Tecartus

usage_context.role: Drives efficient surface expression of CAR construct

CD8a.design_notes: Default leader for CAR-T vectors. Proven efficiency across all major approved products.

GM-CSF.description: GM-CSF signal peptide 17aa. High secretion efficiency.
GM-CSF.tier_justification: Used in multiple published CAR-T constructs; high secretion efficiency

usage_context.role: Alternative leader with higher ER insertion efficiency for some constructs

GM-CSF.design_notes: Use when CD8α SP causes unexpectedly low surface expression.

Granulin.description: Granulin signal peptide 21aa. Strong ER targeting.

usage_context.role: Alternative signal peptide for experimental constructs

Granulin.design_notes: Comparable to CD8α SP; useful for CAAR and armored constructs.

IgG1_Kappa.description: IgG kappa signal peptide 21aa. Classic antibody leader.
IgG1_Kappa.tier_justification: Used in many published bispecific and scFv constructs

usage_context.role: Standard antibody secretion leader; pairs naturally with scFv binders

CD8a_TM.tier_justification: Used in Kymriah, Abecma, Carvykti, Breyanzi

usage_context.role: Low tonic signaling; stable membrane anchoring

CD8a_TM.design_notes: Preferred when reducing tonic signaling to prevent exhaustion in solid tumors. Pairs with CD8α short hinge and 4-1BB costimulation.

CD28_TM.description: CD28 TM 27aa. Lipid raft association, enhanced costimulation.

usage_context.role: Lipid-raft localization; higher tonic signaling baseline

CD28_TM.design_notes: Lipid-raft recruitment enhances CD28-CD3ζ complex formation. Higher tonic signal → risk of exhaustion in chronic antigen exposure (solid tumors).

CD4_TM.tier_justification: Used in published CAR-NK and some CAR-T constructs

usage_context.role: Alternative TM for NK-optimized constructs

CD4_TM.design_notes: Used in early CAR constructs (1st gen). CD4 TM has lower lipid-raft affinity; may reduce tonic signal in some NK contexts.

CD3z_TM.description: CD3ζ TM 30aa. Used in SynNotch-CART hybrid designs.
CD3z_TM.tier_justification: Used in SynNotch hybrids and non-signaling anchor applications

usage_context.role: TM for CD3ζ full-chain constructs; SynNotch hybrids

CD3z_TM.design_notes: Used when building full CD3ζ chain including TM. In standard CAR-T, CD3ζ TM is replaced by CD8α or CD28 TM with CD3ζ cytoplasmic tail only.

iCasp9.description: Caspase-9 ΔCARD (282aa). Use with FKBP12-F36V (from dimerization_domains). AP1903-induced dimerization → apoptosis.
iCasp9.reference: Di Stasi A et al. NEJM 2011;365:1673-83
iCasp9.tier_justification: NCT01494286 (Di Stasi NEJM 2011); >95% CAR-T clearance in <30 min with AP1903

usage_context.role: AP1903 (rimiducid)-induced FKBP12-F36V dimerization → Caspase-9 activation → apoptosis

iCasp9.design_notes: ALWAYS pair with FKBP12-F36V (use F36V variant, not wild-type). Assembly: FKBP12-F36V-[G4S4]-iCasp9(ΔCARD). AP1903 (rimiducid) dose: 0.4mg/kg IV. Effect within 30 min. Di Stasi A et al. NEJM 2011;365:1673-83.

tEGFR.description: Truncated EGFR safety tag (359aa). SP+DomIII+DomIV+TM. Cetuximab-mediated ADCC/CDC T-cell elimination on demand. NO kinase domain.
tEGFR.tier_justification: Multiple Phase I/II trials (St. Jude, MSKCC); cetuximab-mediated ADCC elimination

usage_context.role: Cetuximab binds EGFR Domain III → NK-cell ADCC/CDC-mediated CAR-T elimination on demand

tEGFR.design_notes: CRITICAL: Assemble from SP+DIII+DIV+TM only. Kinase domain inclusion causes oncogenic transformation. Length should be ~313-359aa depending on exact boundaries. Cetuximab dose for elimination: 250mg/m². References: Wang X Blood 2011.

RQR8.description: RQR8 safety tag (73aa). CD34 epitope (QBEnd10 enrichment) + CD20 mimotope (rituximab depletion). Philip B et al. Blood 2014.
RQR8.tier_justification: Autolus; combines CD34 enrichment (QBEnd10) + CD20 depletion (rituximab)

usage_context.role: QBEnd10 antibody enables GMP enrichment; rituximab enables on-demand CAR-T depletion

RQR8.design_notes: 73aa synthetic fusion. CD34 epitope allows anti-CD34 (QBEnd10) magnetic selection for GMP manufacturing. CD20 mimotope allows rituximab-mediated elimination post-therapy. Reference: Philip B et al. Blood 2014;124:1277-87.

FKBP12.description: FKBP12 108aa (P62942). For iCasp9 assembly, use F36V variant (reduces endogenous ligand binding, increases AP1903 specificity).
FKBP12.mutation_note: F36V: position 36 Phe→Val. Increases AP1903 (rimiducid) relative selectivity 1000×.
FKBP12.tier_justification: Component of iCasp9 safety switch system; use F36V variant for AP1903 specificity

usage_context.role: AP1903-induced homodimerization of FKBP12 → activates fused iCasp9

FKBP12.design_notes: F36V mutation required for AP1903 (rimiducid) selectivity over endogenous FKBP ligands. Wild-type FKBP12 responds to both FK506 and AP1903; F36V is ~1000× more selective.

FRB.description: FRB domain of mTOR (92aa). For rapamycin-inducible heterodimerization systems.

FMC63.description: FMC63 CD19 scFv 243aa. Kymriah/Breyanzi gold standard.

qa.source: USPTO 9,701,758 B2; Nicholson IC Mol Immunol 1997

FMC63.tier_justification: Kymriah (tisagenlecleucel) and Breyanzi (lisocabtagene); gold standard CD19 binder

usage_context.role: CD19 recognition for B-ALL, LBCL, follicular lymphoma CAR-T therapy

FMC63.design_notes: VH-(G4S)3-VL orientation. Kd ~0.5nM for human CD19. Binds CD19 epitope encompassing aa 41-196 of extracellular domain. Alternative: SJ25C1 scFv (used in earlier CD19 CARs). Key CDR: VH-CDR3 STYYGGDWYFNV; VL-CDR3 QQHYTTPPT.

m971_hCD22.description: m971 humanized CD22 scFv 242aa. Membrane-proximal epitope.

YP7_GPC3.description: YP7 humanized GPC3 scFv 237aa. HCC treatment.

OKT3_hCD3.description: OKT3 humanized CD3ε scFv 240aa. Bispecific engager.

qa.source: Rosen et al. Sci Transl Med 2018
Heczey et al., JCI 2017; Louis et al., Blood 2011

HER2_Trastuzumab_scFv.description: Trastuzumab scFv 242aa. HER2. Requires affinity attenuation.

HER2t.description: Truncated HER2 safety tag 414aa. Trastuzumab-mediated elimination.

RQR8.tier_justification: Autolus; combines CD34 enrichment (QBEnd10) + CD20 depletion (rituximab)

usage_context.role: QBEnd10 antibody enables GMP enrichment; rituximab enables on-demand CAR-T depletion

RQR8.design_notes: 73aa synthetic fusion. CD34 epitope allows anti-CD34 (QBEnd10) magnetic selection for GMP manufacturing. CD20 mimotope allows rituximab-mediated elimination post-therapy. Reference: Philip B et al. Blood 2014;124:1277-87.

Membrane_IL21.description: Membrane IL-21 170aa. NK expansion and CAR-T persistence.

qa.source: Hurton et al., PNAS 2016 (mbIL-21 NK expansion)

scIL12_p70.description: Single-chain IL-12 p70 330aa. Pro-inflammatory TME remodeling.

qa.source: Koneru et al., PNAS 2015; Chmielewski et al., Cancer Immunol Immunother 2012

armored_cytokines_expanded._note: Armored cytokines are encoded downstream via P2A ribosomal skipping to avoid independent promoters.

Foralumab_hCD3.description: Foralumab (NI-0401) scFv 241aa. Fully human anti-CD3. Treg-CAR.

CD19_Epitope_FMC63.description: 38aa minimal CD19 epitope for FMC63 binding. Cell-surface tracking tag.

CD20_Mimotope.description: 9aa CD20 mimotope. Rituximab-binding epitope for on-demand CAR-T elimination.
CD20_Mimotope.reference: Paszkiewicz PJ et al. J Clin Invest 2016

qa.source: Paszkiewicz PJ et al. J Clin Invest 2016;126:4262-72

Myc_Tag.description: 10aa c-Myc tag. Detection of CAR surface expression via anti-Myc antibody.

Phagocytic_FcRg.description: FcRγ cytoplasmic domain 42aa. CAR-M phagocytic activation.
Phagocytic_FcRg.tier_justification: CAR-Macrophage (CAR-M) for phagocytosis of solid tumors

usage_context.role: Phagocytic activation via Syk kinase; drives tumor cell engulfment

Phagocytic_FcRg.design_notes: Syk-dependent ITAM signaling in macrophages. Use with CD8α hinge/TM + CD3ζ excluded. CAR-M with FcRγ: Morrissey et al. Nat Biotechnol 2022. Induces M1 macrophage polarization + ECM remodeling for solid tumors.

TGFB_DNR.description: TGF-β dominant negative receptor 189aa (ECD+TM). Converts TGF-β suppression → activation in solid tumors.
TGFB_DNR.reference: Tang N et al. Nat Med 2020
TGFB_DNR.tier_justification: Phase I/II solid tumor CAR-T trials with TGF-β-high TME (prostate, HCC, pancreatic)

usage_context.role: Converts TGF-β tumor suppression into CAR-T activation signal; reverses TME immunosuppression

TGFB_DNR.design_notes: TGFB_DNR lacks kinase domain → acts as decoy receptor competing with endogenous TGFβRII. Sequesters TGF-β → reduces Treg induction and exhaustion in TME. Rule: Add TGFB_DNR for all solid tumor targets in TGF-β-rich TME (HCC, pancreatic, prostate). Tang N Nat Med 2020; Foster AE Hum Gene Ther 2008.

SynNotch_Scaffold.description: SynNotch receptor scaffold 182aa. AND-gate gating logic.

TF_Gal4_VP64.description: Gal4 DBD+VP64 transactivator 201aa. SynNotch downstream effector.

switch_receptors._note: Chimeric switch receptors (CSR) convert inhibitory signals to activating. Assembled from inhibitory ECD + activating ICD.

PD1_CD28_CSR.description: PD-1 ectodomain fused to CD28 intracellular domain. Converts PD-L1 inhibition → CD28 costimulation.
PD1_CD28_CSR.reference: Liu X et al. Cancer Res 2016

tcr_mimic_binders._note: TCR-mimic scFvs recognize intracellular peptide:MHC complexes. See ESK1 (WT1/RMFPNAPYL), MAGE-A4 (GVYDGREHTV), NY-ESO1 (SLLMWITQC) for reference sequences.
tcr_mimic_binders._qa_note: TCR-mimic binders require high-precision MHC epitope matching. Sequence selection is patient-HLA dependent.

caar_constructs._note: CAAR (Chimeric Autoantibody Receptor): uses disease-relevant autoantigen ECD to capture and eliminate autoreactive B cells. Key CAAR targets: Dsg3 (pemphigus), MuSK (myasthenia gravis), MOG (multiple sclerosis). See Ellebrecht CT et al. Science 2016.

EAAAK.description: EAAAK rigid linker (5aa). For structural domain separation.

P2A.description: P2A TaV-2A (22aa). Highest cleavage efficiency >99% in vitro.

qa.source: Kim JH et al. PLoS ONE 2011;6(4):e18556

P2A.tier_justification: Used in multiple approved gene therapy and CAR-T constructs for polycistronic expression

usage_context.role: Polycistronic construct spacer — separates CAR from payload without IRES

P2A.design_notes: Highest cleavage efficiency. Ribosomal skipping mechanism (NOT protease). Prepend GSG for +10-15% efficiency. Use P2A first for CAR-safety_switch; T2A for CAR-payload. Efficiency: P2A>T2A>E2A>F2A in most contexts.

qa.source: Kim JH et al. PLoS ONE 2011

T2A.tier_justification: Used in multiple approved gene therapy and CAR-T constructs for polycistronic expression

usage_context.role: Polycistronic construct spacer — separates CAR from payload without IRES

T2A.design_notes: Compact; second choice. Ribosomal skipping mechanism (NOT protease). Prepend GSG for +10-15% efficiency. Use P2A first for CAR-safety_switch; T2A for CAR-payload. Efficiency: P2A>T2A>E2A>F2A in most contexts.

qa.source: Kim JH et al. PLoS ONE 2011

E2A.tier_justification: Used in multiple approved gene therapy and CAR-T constructs for polycistronic expression

usage_context.role: Polycistronic construct spacer — separates CAR from payload without IRES

E2A.design_notes: Good cleavage, common alternative. Ribosomal skipping mechanism (NOT protease). Prepend GSG for +10-15% efficiency. Use P2A first for CAR-safety_switch; T2A for CAR-payload. Efficiency: P2A>T2A>E2A>F2A in most contexts.

qa.source: Kim JH et al. PLoS ONE 2011

F2A.tier_justification: Used in multiple approved gene therapy and CAR-T constructs for polycistronic expression

usage_context.role: Polycistronic construct spacer — separates CAR from payload without IRES

F2A.design_notes: Foot-and-mouth disease virus 2A. Ribosomal skipping mechanism (NOT protease). Prepend GSG for +10-15% efficiency. Use P2A first for CAR-safety_switch; T2A for CAR-payload. Efficiency: P2A>T2A>E2A>F2A in most contexts.

two_A_peptides._note: Prepend GSG to any 2A peptide for enhanced cleavage efficiency. Ribosomal skipping mechanism.

Anti_FITC_h4M53.description: Anti-FITC 4M53 humanized scFv 246aa. Universal CAR adapter for FITC-conjugated targeting ligands.
